notes: Test prompts that should trigger this skill. Running these end-to-end requires a fixture index.html with planted quality issues across the four dimensions (factual, clarity, prose, structural). See evals/fixtures/ for sample pages once created.

evals.prompt: I just finished this FAPI 2.0 explainer at index.html and want to ship it tomorrow. Can you do a quality pass before I send it round? I want to make sure the regulatory references are right and the prose doesn't feel AI-written.
evals.expected_output: Report grouped by severity covering factual (DORA / FAPI / OAuth references verified against primary sources), clarity (undefined acronyms, runaway sentences), prose (AI-slop tic words, hedges, marketing voice), and structural (audience switcher wired, glossary completeness, single accent). Followed by interactive approval pass for each finding.

evals.prompt: this index.html got handed to me from a colleague and i'm not sure it's accurate — pcidss 4 stuff in particular. can you audit it?
evals.expected_output: Factual-heavy report with PCI-DSS 4.0.x clause IDs verified via Firecrawl against the PCI SSC documents, version numbers checked against current revision, every cited clause cross-referenced. Other dimensions covered but factual leads the report.

evals.prompt: is the page in this repo any good
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers on terse phrasing because it pattern-matches to QA intent on an HTML page in cwd. Discovers index.html, builds dossier via Firecrawl on the topic extracted from the page, runs all four dimensions, reports inline.
